headline.purpose: Prominent module headings and named areas.

shadows.purpose: Reserved for the live project indicator.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for hover, focus, and state transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The default action control. Dense, direct, and theme-inverted.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:0.5rem;height:36px;padding:0 16px;border:1px solid transparent;border-radius:8px;background:var(--primary);color:var(--primary-foreground);font:500 0.875rem/1.4 "Bricolage Grotesque",system-ui,sans-serif;white-space:nowrap;transition:background-color .2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1),box-shadow .2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1),transform .2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);}.ds-btn-primary:hover{background:color-mix(in oklch,var(--primary) 90%,transparent);}.ds-btn-primary:focus-visible{outline:none;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch,var(--ring) 50%,transparent);}.ds-btn-primary:active{transform:translateY(1px);}

components.description: Secondary action control with quiet structure and no extra chrome.

components.description: Lowercase route language with a short underline reveal.

components.html: <input class="ds-input-underline" type="text" placeholder="Subject of your message" />

narrative.overview:
This system treats the portfolio like a personal interface rather than a marketing campaign. The page should feel spare, direct, and technically literate, with enough authored detail to remind visitors that a person made it. The black-and-white structure is not neutrality for its own sake, it is a way to keep the work, the names, and the small interactions in the foreground.

The tone is minimal and technical, with small handwritten or kinetic details that make it feel authored. Typography carries most of the personality. Motion stays brief and useful. Color is almost entirely structural, then a playful detail lands harder because the rest of the screen stays quiet.

This system explicitly rejects anything generic, SaaS-like, template-heavy, corporate, or interchangeable with a startup landing page. It must not drift into polished-but-anonymous portfolio patterns or feel like a product marketing surface disguised as a personal portfolio.
keyCharacteristics: Monochrome structure with rare authored accents
Playful details used as signatures, not decorations
Theme inversion that preserves the same identity in light and dark

rules.name: The Monochrome Inversion Rule
rules.body: Light and dark mode are the same identity in reverse. Do not invent separate personalities for each theme.

rules.name: The Rare Accent Rule
rules.body: Saturated color is reserved for meaning, status, or one-off authored details. If a screen starts looking colorful by default, the system has drifted.

rules.name: The Single-System Rule
rules.body: Bricolage Grotesque carries the interface. Caveat appears only when a moment benefits from a visible human hand.

rules.name: The Utility Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadows explain layer and state. They do not create atmosphere.

dos: Do preserve sparse layouts and let concise content, rules, and spacing carry the hierarchy.
Do keep the palette almost monochrome and let light/dark inversion do the heavy lifting.
Do use playful details selectively, especially in handwritten accents, small motion, and live-state signals.
Do make buttons, links, and focus states feel direct and keyboard-friendly instead of ornamental.
Do keep cards, chips, and framed surfaces restrained enough that the work itself stays primary.
donts: Don't make this generic, SaaS-like, template-heavy, corporate, or interchangeable with a startup landing page.
Don't drift into polished-but-anonymous portfolio patterns or make this feel like a product marketing surface disguised as a personal portfolio.
Don't add hero metrics, identical card grids, glassy panels, or decorative gradient text.
Don't use color as filler. If a bright accent is not carrying meaning, state, or authored personality, remove it.
Don't replace the current sparse, technical tone with editorial-magazine theatrics, developer-costume monospaces, or oversized marketing chrome.
